title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Care Ratings Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Care Ratings Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Care Ratings Capital India in Rajkot is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Care Ratings Capital India:
Care Ratings Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Ratings Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
